briefdescription.para: This function runs both GCM and GMAC tests.
This function encrypts the data with provided key and IV.

detaileddescription.para: The output result is then decrypted back to get original data and checks GCM tag. The test fails, if decryption not produce the original data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the AES GCM test was successful.
ErrorCode if the AES GCM test was failed.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the SecureAesExample function.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if example runs successfully
ErrorCode if the example fails.
